notes: Won't start, tried with different proton launch options, and disabling Steam overlay.
title: D4: Dark Dreams Don’t Die -Season One-
D4: Dark Dreams Don’t Die -Season One-

notes: Seems to work fine after installing wine-mono: "http://dl.winehq.org/wine/wine-mono/4.7.3/". I used the "PROTON_DUMP_DEBUG_COMMANDS=1 %command%" launch option to get the 'run' script and then executed in a terminal "/tmp/proton_$USER/run msiexec /i fullpathtowine-mono.msi". I also renamed the DotNet's exe in the '_CommonRedist' folder inside the game's directory, otherwise steam attempts to install it everytime.
title: D4: Dark Dreams Don’t Die -Season One-
